mapper.select: SELECT e.*, g.name as group_name, d.name as department_name, gm.name as grade_name, gm.cost_rate FROM engineers e LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON e.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN departments d ON g.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN grade_masters gm ON e.grade = gm.grade AND e.sub_grade = gm.sub_grade ORDER BY e.created_at DESC

SELECT e.*, g.name as group_name, d.name as department_name, gm.name as grade_name, gm.cost_rate FROM engineers e LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON e.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN departments d ON g.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN grade_masters gm ON e.grade = gm.grade AND e.sub_grade = gm.sub_grade WHERE e.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO engineers (employee_number, name, email, phone, skill_set, experience_years, experience_months, employment_status, group_id, grade, sub_grade) VALUES (#{employeeNumber}, #{name}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{skillSet}, #{experienceYears}, #{experienceMonths}, #{employmentStatus}, #{groupId}, #{grade}, #{subGrade})
mapper.update: UPDATE engineers SET employee_number = #{employeeNumber}, name = #{name}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, skill_set = #{skillSet}, experience_years = #{experienceYears}, experience_months = #{experienceMonths}, employment_status = #{employmentStatus}, group_id = #{groupId}, grade = #{grade}, sub_grade = #{subGrade} WHERE id = #{id}
